title: Golf — Activities near Mas du Chanoine
description: Golf: discover this activity near our guesthouse on the French Riviera.
paragraphs: The French Riviera is an ideal destination for golf lovers. More than 10 18-hole golf courses and 6 9-hole golf courses are accessible within a 15-km radius around Mas du Chanoine.

18-hole courses: Monte-Carlo Golf Club, Golf Club de Biot, Golf Country Club de Cannes Mougins, Golf d'Opio, Golf de la Grande Bastide, Golf du Royal Mougins, Golf du Claux-Amic, Golf Country Club de Saint-Donat, Golf Old Course Mandelieu.
9-hole courses: Golf de Villeneuve-Loubet, Golf Country Club de Nice, Le Provençal Golf Biot, Victoria Golf Club Valbonne.
